answer: Microsoft's 2024 fiscal year revenue was $261.8 billion, a 12.9% increase year-over-year. This growth was driven by strong performance in cloud services and other key sectors.

results.title: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion - The Business Standard
results.snippet: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion. ## By The Numbers. ## Microsoft reports $245 billion revenue for Fiscal Year ended June 30, 2024, a 16% increase, driven by strong performance in cloud services and other key sectors. Microsoft revenue reached $245 billion in 2024, showing strong growth. Image of Microsoft headquarters with revenue increase graphic. Microsoft's revenue hits $245B in 2024! Microsoft's revenue climbed to $245 billion in 2024, up from $212 billion the previous year, which represents a 16% increase. As the world's second-largest company by market cap, the company reported net income of $88.1 billion in 2024, posting an impressive 22% annual increase. Microsoft's 2024 revenue breakdown showing Azure as the top earner, followed by Office, Windows, Gaming (Xbox), and LinkedIn. Revenue percentages shown. Azure leads Microsoft's revenue in 2024 | Illustration: Ashrafun naher Ananna. #### Top News. By the numbers / Microsoft / revenue. Published comments are readers’ own views and The Business Standard does not endorse any of the readers’ comments.

results.title: Microsoft Revenue 2012-2025 | MSFT - Macrotrends
results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: Microsoft (MSFT) - Revenue
results.snippet: # Revenue for Microsoft (MSFT). ## **Revenue in 2025 (TTM): $305.45 Billion USD**. According to **Microsoft**'s latest financial reports the company's current revenue (TTM ) is **$305.45 Billion USD**. The revenue is the total amount of income that a company generates by the sale of goods or services. ## Revenue history for Microsoft from 1996 to 2025. ### Revenue for similar companies or competitors. | Apple Logo  Apple  AAPL | $435.61 B | 42.61% | USA |. | Cisco Logo  Cisco  CSCO | $59.05 B | -80.67% | USA |. | Oracle Logo  Oracle  ORCL | $64.07 B | -79.02% | USA |. | IBM Logo  IBM  IBM | $67.53 B | -77.89% | USA |. | HP Logo  HP  HPQ | $56.22 B | -81.59% | USA |. results.title: Productivity and Business Processes Performance - Investor Relations
results.snippet: •  Office Commercial products and cloud services revenue increased $5.8 billion or 14%. •  Office Consumer products and cloud services revenue increased $237 million or 4%. •  Dynamics products and cloud services revenue increased $1.0 billion or 19% driven by Dynamics 365. •  Gross margin increased $6.5 billion or 12% driven by growth in Office 365 Commercial. *IMPORTANT NOTICE TO USERS (summary only, click here  for full text of notice);*All information is unaudited unless otherwise noted or accompanied by an audit opinion and is subject to the more comprehensive information contained in our SEC reports and filings. All information speaks as of the last fiscal quarter or year for which we have filed a Form 10-K or 10-Q, or for historical information the date or period expressly indicated in or with such information. Information contained in these documents is current as of the earnings date, and not restated for new accounting standards. #### Related Information.
